__fixture__.name: managed_cloud_upgrade_review_blocked_resolver_conflict
__fixture__.scenario: Managed-cloud upgrade against a managed_org_curated_registry under a delegated-identity handle. The proposed lockfile change would force a transitive across a major boundary while another transitive surfaces a resolver conflict the user must resolve. The pre-apply review packet resolves to review_blocked_pending_lockfile_resolution; apply does not proceed. Validates that the review packet attributes lockfile, transitive, and rollback truth before apply, that delegated-identity auth is explicit, and that resolver conflict is surfaced honestly rather than relabelled as a minor change.
acceptance_bullets: 1: lockfile / transitive / rollback truth before apply

decision_note: Upgrade blocked: one transitive crosses a major boundary and a second transitive surfaces a resolver conflict. The user must resolve the conflict before apply proceeds.
registry_disclosure: Managed org-curated registry; delegated-identity handle authenticates the upgrade query.
script_risk_disclosure: Upgrade target carries declarative metadata only; no install scripts run on this candidate.

lockfile_impact_envelope.lockfile_impact_disclosure: Four lockfile entries would be updated and one new entry added; the resolver could not converge for one transitive.

transitive_impact_envelope.transitive_impact_disclosure: One transitive crosses a major boundary; one resolver conflict requires the user to choose a successor.

rollback_posture_disclosure: If the user admits the upgrade, rollback restores the prior lockfile checkpoint.
mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Online; managed-cloud profile admits curated origin reads.
